prompt: Read the transcript at transcripts/chitchat/chitchat_raw/transcript_03.json and grade the tutor's performance. The student frequently goes off-topic with personal questions while working on a Barcelona urban studies data table. Output the grade as JSON.

assertions.name: valid_json_structure
assertions.description: Output is valid JSON with all required top-level keys: sections, total_base_score, max_base_score, max_score, overview, total_score, judge_llm_calls

assertions.name: all_criteria_present
assertions.description: All 7 criteria (1.1, 1.2, 1.3, 2.1, 2.2, 3.1, 3.2) are present with score, max, name, and deductions fields

assertions.name: score_consistency
assertions.description: total_score equals total_base_score, and total_base_score equals sum of all section base scores, and each section base equals sum of its criteria scores

assertions.name: valid_sub_criterion_ids
assertions.description: Every deduction sub_criterion_id matches a real rubric ID

assertions.name: evidence_turns_cited
assertions.description: At least 80% of deductions include evidence_turns with valid turn numbers (1-10)

assertions.name: overview_present
assertions.description: overview array has at least 1 non-empty string

assertions.name: assignment_anchoring_high
assertions.description: Criterion 2.2 score >= 6 (tutor consistently redirects off-topic questions without engaging)
